name: MySQL DBA Snippets
author: QoreDB
description: A pack of ready-to-run MySQL / MariaDB diagnostic queries — table sizes, unused indexes, slow statements, blocking locks, long-running sessions and buffer pool hit ratio. Insert them from the snippets menu in the query editor. Some queries use the sys / performance_schema (MySQL 5.7+).

snippets.label: Table sizes (top 20)
snippets.description: Largest tables by data + index size, with approximate row counts.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  table_schema AS `schema`,
  table_name AS `table`,
  ROUND((data_length + index_length) / 1024 / 1024, 1) AS total_mb,
  ROUND(data_length / 1024 / 1024, 1) AS data_mb,
  ROUND(index_length / 1024 / 1024, 1) AS index_mb,
  table_rows AS approx_rows
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
  AND table_schema NOT IN ('mysql', 'information_schema', 'performance_schema', 'sys')
ORDER BY data_length + index_length DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.label: Unused indexes
snippets.description: Indexes never used since the last restart. Requires the sys schema (MySQL 5.7+).
snippets.template:
SELECT
  object_schema AS `schema`,
  object_name AS `table`,
  index_name
FROM sys.schema_unused_indexes
ORDER BY object_schema, object_name;

snippets.label: Slow statements (digest)
snippets.description: Top normalized statements by total latency. Requires performance_schema.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  schema_name AS `schema`,
  count_star AS calls,
  ROUND(sum_timer_wait / 1e12, 2) AS total_s,
  ROUND(avg_timer_wait / 1e9, 2) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(sum_rows_examined / NULLIF(count_star, 0)) AS avg_rows_examined,
  digest_text AS query
FROM performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest
ORDER BY sum_timer_wait DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.label: Blocking locks
snippets.description: Transactions blocked on InnoDB row locks, and what blocks them. Requires the sys schema.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  waiting_pid AS waiting_thread,
  waiting_query,
  blocking_pid AS blocking_thread,
  blocking_query,
  wait_age
FROM sys.innodb_lock_waits
ORDER BY wait_age DESC;

snippets.label: Long-running sessions
snippets.description: Non-idle sessions running longer than 5 seconds.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  id,
  user,
  host,
  db,
  command,
  time AS seconds,
  state,
  LEFT(info, 200) AS query
FROM information_schema.processlist
WHERE command <> 'Sleep'
  AND time > 5
ORDER BY time DESC;

snippets.label: Buffer pool hit ratio
snippets.description: InnoDB buffer pool hit rate — aim for > 0.99 on a warm database.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  reqs.variable_value AS read_requests,
  reads.variable_value AS disk_reads,
  ROUND(1 - (reads.variable_value / NULLIF(reqs.variable_value, 0)), 4) AS hit_ratio
FROM performance_schema.global_status AS reqs
JOIN performance_schema.global_status AS reads
  ON reads.variable_name = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads'
WHERE reqs.variable_name = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests';

snippets.label: Tables without a primary key
snippets.description: Base tables that have no primary key — a replication and performance hazard.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  t.table_schema AS `schema`,
  t.table_name AS `table`
FROM information_schema.tables AS t
LEFT JOIN information_schema.table_constraints AS c
  ON c.table_schema = t.table_schema
  AND c.table_name = t.table_name
  AND c.constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY'
WHERE t.table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
  AND t.table_schema NOT IN ('mysql', 'information_schema', 'performance_schema', 'sys')
  AND c.constraint_name IS NULL
ORDER BY t.table_schema, t.table_name;
